calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootksy for Elizabeth Casalett (Petitioner/Successor Trustee).

Mr. Skootksy addressed the issue of fees, services provided by the Trustee and explained how fees were calculated. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Continued To May-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2800 Ocean Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Elizabeth Casalett.

The sale was confirmed at $680,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-05-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Elizabeth Casalett.

The Court noted that the Conservatee passed away on May 18th. Mr. Der stated that he does not know the status of the Conservatorship, provided background history, and spoke of time spent and issues his Client dealt with to support the Trustee's fees. The Court approved the Fourth Account (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Rob Harris.
